## IdentifierResultsActions.fetchIdentifierResults() method

Requests a new set of identifier results for the module query, and returns them.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
fetchIdentifierResults(request: SearchByIdRequest | null): Result[];
```

|  --- | --- | --- |
|  request | SearchByIdRequest \| null |  |
